title: centella virgata var. virgata
intro: Centella virgata var. virgata, also known as Indian pennywort, is a type of plant that belongs to the family Apocynaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Centella virgata var. virgata include improving cognitive function, reducing stress and anxiety, and promoting wound healing. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, capsules, and ointments, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
